task_completion.description: Verify the workflow name, target module, and status are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a SuiteCRM Workflow edit or detail screen showing the Name as 'Auto-Qualify High-Value Prospects', the Target Module as 'Opportunities', and the Status as 'Active'.
Look for the execution settings on the workflow screen showing 'Run' set to 'Always' and 'Run On' set to 'All Records'.

task_completion.description: Verify the condition for the Opportunity Amount.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the Conditions section of the workflow for a rule where the field is 'Amount', the operator is 'Greater Than or Equal To' (or >=), and the value is '50000'.

task_completion.description: Verify the condition for the Sales Stage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the Conditions section of the workflow for a rule where the field is 'Sales Stage', the operator is 'Equal To' (or =), and the value is 'Prospecting'.

task_completion.description: Verify the workflow action is configured to modify the record's sales stage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the Actions section for an action of type 'Modify Record', with the name 'Advance to Qualification', configured to set the 'Sales Stage' field to 'Qualification'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the SuiteCRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the SuiteCRM application, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing MySQL/MariaDB commands or scripts being executed to insert the workflow directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually filled out and saved the workflow form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the SuiteCRM form fields, dropdowns, and clicking the 'Save' button, rather than just viewing a static page or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Workflow Name: 'Auto-Qualify High-Value Prospects'. Expected Target Module: 'Opportunities'. Expected Status: 'Active'. Expected Execution: Run 'Always' on 'All Records'. Expected Conditions: 'Amount' >= 50000 AND 'Sales Stage' = 'Prospecting'. Expected Action: 'Modify Record' named 'Advance to Qualification' setting 'Sales Stage' to 'Qualification'.
